trans-unit.source: Please select a page from the page tree to run the accessibility check.
trans-unit.target: Feuch an tagh thu duilleag bhon chraobh dhuilleagan gus an sgrùdadh so-ruigsinneachd a ruith.

trans-unit.source: Run Accessibility Scan
trans-unit.target: Ruith Sganadh So-ruigsinneachd

trans-unit.source: Scanning engine:
trans-unit.target: Einnsean sganaidh:

trans-unit.source: axe-core (recommended)
trans-unit.target: axe-core (air a mholadh)

trans-unit.source: HTML CodeSniffer
trans-unit.target: HTML CodeSniffer

trans-unit.source: This module provides automated assistance for accessibility checks. It does not replace a full audit by qualified accessibility auditors, which is required to have a page officially certified as accessible.
trans-unit.target: Bheir am mòideal seo cuideachadh fèin-obrachail airson sgrùdaidhean so-ruigsinneachd. Chan eil e a' dol an àite in-sgrùdadh iomlan le luchd-sgrùdaidh so-ruigsinneachd teisteanaichte, a tha riatanach airson duilleag fhaighinn le teisteanas oifigeil mar dhuilleag so-ruigsinneach.

trans-unit.source: axe-core (recommended) checks the page against the WCAG accessibility guidelines — the standard that ensures people using screen readers, keyboard navigation, or other assistive technology can use your content. It is the actively maintained, industry-standard tool and produces very few incorrect warnings, so almost everything it reports is worth acting on.
trans-unit.target: Bidh axe-core (air a mholadh) a' sgrùdadh na duilleige an aghaidh stiùiridhean so-ruigsinneachd WCAG — an inbhe a chinnteachas gum faod daoine a bhios a' cleachdadh leughadairean sgrìn, seòladh meur-chlàir, no teicneòlas taic eile do susbaint a chleachdadh. Is e an inneal gnìomhach, inbhe na h-earrainn a th' ann, agus cha dèan e ach glè bheag de rabhaidhean ceàrr, mar sin tha e airidh a bhith ag obrachadh air cha mhòr a h-uile càil a bheir e iomradh.

trans-unit.source: HTML CodeSniffer checks the page against similar accessibility guidelines, but with an older, less refined method. It can occasionally point out issues axe-core misses, but it also produces many more results that need a closer manual look before you can tell whether something is really a problem. Use it only for a second opinion, not as your main scan.
trans-unit.target: Bidh HTML CodeSniffer a' sgrùdadh na duilleige an aghaidh stiùiridhean so-ruigsinneachd co-chosmhail, ach le seann dòigh nach eil cho snasail. Aig amannan is urrainn dha cùisean a chomharrachadh nach fhaic axe-core, ach bheir e cuideachd mòran a bharrachd de thoraidhean a dh'fheumas sùil-làimhe nas mionaidiche mus urrainn dhut a ràdh a bheil duilgheadas ann dha-rìribh. Na cleachd e ach airson dàrna beachd, chan ann mar do phrìomh sganadh.

trans-unit.source: Loading page and running scan…
trans-unit.target: A' luchdachadh duilleag agus a' ruith sganadh…

trans-unit.source: Violations
trans-unit.target: Briseadh riaghailtean

trans-unit.source: Needs review
trans-unit.target: Feumaidh lèirmheas

trans-unit.source: Automated scanning could not determine whether these items pass or fail. Each one needs to be checked manually.
trans-unit.target: Cha b' urrainn dhan sganadh fèin-obrachail a dhearbhadh an do shoirbhich no an do dh'fhàillig na nithean seo. Feumaidh gach fear dhiubh a bhith air a sgrùdadh a làimh.

trans-unit.source: Passes
trans-unit.target: A shoirbhich

trans-unit.source: No accessibility issues found.
trans-unit.target: Cha deach duilgheadas so-ruigsinneachd a lorg.

trans-unit.source: Filters
trans-unit.target: Criathragan

trans-unit.source: Severity:
trans-unit.target: Cudromachd:

trans-unit.source: Critical
trans-unit.target: Èiginneach

trans-unit.source: Serious
trans-unit.target: Trom

trans-unit.source: Moderate
trans-unit.target: Meadhanach

trans-unit.source: Minor
trans-unit.target: Beag

trans-unit.source: View
trans-unit.target: Sealladh

trans-unit.source: For editors
trans-unit.target: Airson luchd-deasachaidh

trans-unit.source: For developers
trans-unit.target: Airson luchd-leasachaidh

trans-unit.source: The accessibility scan could not be completed. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Cha b' urrainn an sganadh so-ruigsinneachd a choileanadh. Feuch ris a-rithist.

trans-unit.source: No preview URL available for this page. Ensure the page has a valid site configuration.
trans-unit.target: Chan eil URL ro-shealladh ri fhaotainn airson na duilleige seo. Dèan cinnteach gu bheil rèiteachadh làraich dligheach aig an duilleag.

trans-unit.source: Add an image description (alt text) in the content element editor.
trans-unit.target: Cuir tuairisgeul ìomhaigh (teacsa alt) ris ann an deasaiche eileamaid na susbaint.

trans-unit.source: This image is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's image rendering (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Chan eil an ìomhaigh seo ceangailte ri susbaint a ghabhas deasachadh, no tha an teacsa alt aice air a shuidheachadh ach chan eil e air a thoirt gu buil. Sgrùd toirt gu buil ìomhaighean an teamplaid (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Add an alt text to the image input element in the content editor.
trans-unit.target: Cuir teacsa alt ris an eileamaid cur a-steach ìomhaigh san deasaiche susbaint.

trans-unit.source: This image input is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's rendering (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Chan eil an cur a-steach ìomhaigh seo ceangailte ri susbaint a ghabhas deasachadh, no tha an teacsa alt aige air a shuidheachadh ach chan eil e air a thoirt gu buil. Sgrùd toirt gu buil an teamplaid (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Add alt text to the image map area in the content editor.
trans-unit.target: Cuir teacsa alt ris an raon mapa ìomhaigh san deasaiche susbaint.

trans-unit.source: This image map area is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's rendering (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Chan eil raon mapa ìomhaigh seo ceangailte ri susbaint a ghabhas deasachadh, no tha an teacsa alt aige air a shuidheachadh ach chan eil e air a thoirt gu buil. Sgrùd toirt gu buil an teamplaid (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Edit the content element and change its Header Layout so heading levels don't skip a step.
trans-unit.target: Deasaich eileamaid na susbaint agus atharraich a Cho-dhealbhachd Bann-cinn ionns nach gearr ìrean nam bann-cinn ceum sam bith às.

trans-unit.source: This heading is rendered by the page template rather than a content element. Adjust the heading structure in the Fluid template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Tha am bann-cinn seo air a thoirt gu buil leis an teamplaid duilleige seach le eileamaid susbaint. Atharraich structar nam bann-cinn san teamplaid Fluid (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: A heading element is rendered with no text. Check the template's heading rendering; it should not output a heading tag when the source text is empty (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Tha eileamaid bann-cinn air a thoirt gu buil gun teacsa. Sgrùd toirt gu buil nam bann-cinn san teamplaid; cha bu chòir dha taga bann-cinn a thoirt a-mach nuair a tha an teacsa tùsail bàn (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Edit the link in the content editor and provide a descriptive link text.
trans-unit.target: Deasaich an ceangal san deasaiche susbaint agus cuir teacsa ceangail tuairisgeulach ris.

trans-unit.source: This link is rendered by the page template without link text and isn't linked to editable content. Add visible text or an aria-label in the Fluid template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Tha an ceangal seo air a thoirt gu buil leis an teamplaid duilleige gun teacsa ceangail agus chan eil e ceangailte ri susbaint a ghabhas deasachadh. Cuir teacsa faicsinneach no aria-label ris san teamplaid Fluid (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Update the table structure in the content editor to associate data cells with headers.
trans-unit.target: Ùraich structar an clàir san deasaiche susbaint gus ceallan dàta a cheangal ri bann-cinn.

trans-unit.source: This table is not linked to editable content. Update the table structure in the template so data cells reference their headers (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Chan eil an clàr seo ceangailte ri susbaint a ghabhas deasachadh. Ùraich structar an clàir san teamplaid gus na ceallan dàta a bhith a' toirt iomradh air na bann-cinn aca (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Update the table in the content editor so header cells have associated data cells.
trans-unit.target: Ùraich an clàr san deasaiche susbaint ionns gum bi ceallan dàta ceangailte ri ceallan bann-cinn.

trans-unit.source: This table is not linked to editable content. Update the table structure in the template so header cells have associated data cells (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Chan eil an clàr seo ceangailte ri susbaint a ghabhas deasachadh. Ùraich structar an clàir san teamplaid ionns gum bi ceallan dàta ceangailte ri ceallan bann-cinn (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Add a main landmark element to the page template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Cuir eileamaid comharra-tìre main ris an teamplaid duilleige (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Ensure all page content is contained within appropriate landmark regions in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Dèan cinnteach gu bheil susbaint na duilleige uile am broinn roinnean comharra-tìre iomchaidh san teamplaid (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Add a skip navigation link to the page template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Cuir ceangal gearradh-seachad seòlaidh ris an teamplaid duilleige (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Set the lang attribute on the HTML element in the page template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Suidhich am buadh lang air an eileamaid HTML san teamplaid duilleige (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Use a valid BCP 47 language tag on the HTML element (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Cleachd taga cànain dligheach BCP 47 air an eileamaid HTML (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Adjust CSS color values to meet WCAG contrast requirements (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Atharraich luachan datha CSS gus riatanasan iomsgaraidh WCAG a choileanadh (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Remove user-scalable=no from the viewport meta tag in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Thoir air falbh user-scalable=no bhon taga meta viewport san teamplaid (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Add a title attribute to all iframe elements in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Cuir buadh title ri gach eileamaid iframe san teamplaid (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Make scrollable regions keyboard-accessible in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Dèan roinnean scrolaidh so-ruigsinneach leis a' mheur-chlàr san teamplaid (obair luchd-leasachaidh).

trans-unit.source: Check Accessibility
trans-unit.target: Sgrùd So-ruigsinneachd

trans-unit.source: Check accessibility for this page
trans-unit.target: Sgrùd so-ruigsinneachd na duilleige seo
